$comment: Copy this file to <project>/.claude/review-config.json and edit. The 07-qa Step 0 dispatcher reads it on each Phase 7 invocation. If the file is absent, the dispatcher applies the same default shown here ('reviewer': 'claude'). Override at runtime with env var CLAUDE_PLUGIN_REVIEWER=claude|codex|cross.
$resolution_order: env var CLAUDE_PLUGIN_REVIEWER  >  this file  >  built-in default ('claude')

codex.$comment: Used only when reviewer is 'codex' or 'cross'. The exact codex CLI invocation is TBD until verified against `codex --help`; the codex-reviewer skill keeps the command on a single line so flags can be adjusted without touching the dispatcher.

per_phase_overrides.$comment: Optional. Per-phase reviewer override. Phase keys are '00' through '08'. Missing phases inherit the top-level 'reviewer'.

_writer_reserved.$comment: Reserved for a future PR. The 05-implementation skill currently ignores this key. Forward-compatible: existing setups that omit 'writer' continue to use Claude as the writer.
